assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: Recommends REGULAR release channel instead of STABLE or EXTENDED, which actually increases upgrade frequency rather than minimizing it

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: Explicitly shows maintenance exclusions with scope NO_UPGRADES and explains this blocks upgrades while allowing security patches

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: Shows maintenance window configuration with specific start time (02:00 UTC) and deployment flow shows weekly Sunday maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: Explicitly shows separate node pools: h100-training-pool for GPU workloads and system-pool for system components with taints

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: Shows autoUpgrade: false and autoRepair: false for training pool, and provides CLI commands to disable/enable upgrades around training runs

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: Does not mention checkpointing or job resumption strategies for training frameworks

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: Does not mention GPU driver version testing or staging validation processes

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: Does not mention GPUDirect/RDMA networking compatibility requirements or version verification needs
